topStories.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister warned the US that the island's military is ready to respond to any aggression as the Trump administration pushes for regime change. He stated that the military is currently preparing for ‘possibility of military aggression’.

dailyNews.title: US Southwest Heat Wave Tumbles Records, Raises Fire Risk
dailyNews.description: Nearly 9.5 million people across the US Southwest face extreme high temperatures, as an ongoing heat wave continues to topple records and raise the risk of wildfires as far away as the Great Plains.

dailyNews.title: Iranian authorities taunt US, Israel, EU amid strikes and assassinations
dailyNews.description: Iranians are concerned about the impact of potential attacks on power plants as the scope of US-Israel war expands.

dailyNews.title: Iran Vows To 'Completely Close' Strait Of Hormuz If US Targets Power Plants
dailyNews.description: Iran has already partially choked Hormuz since the outbreak of war on Feb. 27, leading to oil and gas prices shooting up globally.

dailyNews.title: Trouble continues for Cuba as it faces second blackout in a week. Will the island nation be forced to fold?
dailyNews.description: On Saturday, Cuba faced its second blackout in a week after the grid collapsed. The island nation is already witnessing troubles as the US has blocked fuel supplies to Havana, plunging the country into a state of uncertainty.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s changing messages on Iran war: What does it say about US strategy?
dailyNews.description: With the war in its fourth week, the Trump administration sends contradictory messages on how to proceed.

dailyNews.description: Trump’s announcement follows his earlier warning that ICE agents would be deployed if lawmakers failed to reach a funding agreement for the Department of Homeland Security (DHS).

dailyNews.description: The Congress and DMK broadly agreed to share 15 seats each in the 30-member Puducherry Assembly, which goes to polls on April 9

dailyNews.title: Canada’s Supreme Court must strike down Quebec’s Bill 21
dailyNews.description: Under the guise of preserving secularism, this law allows the exclusion of people based on their religious identity.

dailyNews.title: Puerto Rican activists bring medicine to Havana despite US blockade
dailyNews.description: Puerto Rican activists brought suitcases filled with medicine and medical supplies to Havana despite US blockade.

dailyNews.title: Middle East Conflict: Israeli PM Netanyahu urges global leaders to join the war with US against Iran
dailyNews.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Sunday (local time) called on the global leaders to join hands with Israel and the US in their war against Iran, citing Tehran's recent attacks on Tel Aviv.

dailyNews.title: Meteor breaks apart mid-air over Texas, triggers loud booms | Watch
dailyNews.description: As per the space agency, residents reported seeing the luminous object at around 4:40 p.m. CDT, describing it as a streak racing across the sky. The meteor first became visible at an altitude of roughly 49 miles above Stagecoach, located northwest of Houston.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Made a Fundamental Miscalculation about Iran
dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be "completely closed" if Trump delivers on threats
dailyNews.description: President Trump's threat came after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.title: Mike Waltz says "I would never take anything off the table" on bombing Iran nuclear plants
dailyNews.description: President Trump has threatened to bomb Iran's nuclear plants and civilian energy infrastructure. U.S. Ambassador to the U.N. Mike Waltz told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that all options remain possible and he would "never take anything off the table for this president."

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says it is ready to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has asked a federal judge to dissolve her order preventing ICE from deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia to Liberia.

dailyNews.title: Cory Booker: "We, the people, are the heroes this country needs"
dailyNews.description: The New Jersey Senator has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration. He expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues.

dailyNews.title: In conversation with Cory Booker
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Senator Cory Booker has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration – from a record-breaking filibuster critical of the president's policies, to calls for accountability over U.S. involvement in the war with Iran. He also expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues. He talks with Faith Salie about a political career forged in Newark, N.J. ("the toughest place in politics ever"), and how it is time to "seize, reclaim, and redeem the dream of America."

dailyNews.title: Scott Bessent defends U.S. military actions in Iran: 'Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate'
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent discusses the Trump Administration’s decision to remove sanctions on Iranian oil and talks about the cost of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Cuban deputy FM reacts to Trump’s threats to take over Cuba: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban Deputy Foreign Minister Carlos Fernández de Cossío says “our military is always prepared” but “we don't pose any threat to the United States” after President Trump threatened a U.S. takeover of Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Flyers react to Trump’s plan for federal immigration agents
dailyNews.description: Flyers at Newark Liberty International Airport in Newark, N.J., had mixed reactions to President Donald Trump's plan to send federal immigration agents to airports amid the Department of Homeland Security shutdown. Lawmakers on Capitol Hill have been working through the weekend to fund TSA and alleviate staff squeezes, but a bill has not been passed yet. NBC New York’s Charles Watson reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran refuses to back down after Trump issues 48-hour deadline over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Tehran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure and target critical water desalination facilities should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to “obliterate” the country’s power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz
